name: FP16 vs FP32 – 5 Iterations Each (2048×2048 matmul)
key_observations: FP32 power ramped from 76.06W to 137.28W across 60 iterations at 0% utilization
FP16 power remained stable between 76.69W and 78.72W throughout
FP32 utilization reported 0% despite active compute — ghost power confirmed
FP16 utilization peaked at 4% — near-idle reporting during active workload
Temperature rose 1C from FP32 to FP16 phase (44C to 45C)
FP16 iteration time 4.7x faster than FP32 (0.52ms vs 2.45ms average)

ghost_power_evidence.note: Power draw increasing monotonically while utilization remains at 0% — consistent with DESYNC anomaly pattern
